It's essential to remember that technology is not age-specific. Many seniors have successfully learned new skills and adapted to new technologies in their 50s, 60s, and beyond. Break down complex tasks into smaller steps, and prioritize your spending based on your goals and priorities.

Now that you've learned about the basics and practical applications of Base44, it's time to get started.
